formatPolicy: Use SVG wrappers for scalable, high-definition surfaces while preserving original Transparent Textures PNG source URLs and attribution.

textures.name: Textured Paper
textures.licenseOrTerms: Transparent Textures page records the creator and Subtle Patterns origin; verify upstream terms before redistributing raw PNGs. This repo stores SVG wrappers with source/provenance links rather than vendored PNG binaries.
textures.visualCharacter: soft neutral paper grain with sparse flecks
